message:
feat(tracking): Add ProcessedLog for session processing state

Introduces a new tracking module for managing the state of which sessions
have been processed by the reflect pipeline:

1. ProcessedLog class:
   - Tracks which sessions have been processed to avoid re-processing
   - Uses TSV (tab-separated values) format for human-readable storage
   - Fields: diaryId, sessionPath, processedAt timestamp, deltasGenerated

2. Key methods:
   - load(): Async load from disk, handles missing file gracefully
   - save(): Atomic write with directory creation (via ensureDir)
   - has(sessionPath): Check if session was already processed
   - get(sessionPath): Retrieve processing details
   - add(entry): Mark session as processed with metadata
   - delete(sessionPath): Remove entry (for reprocessing)

3. Design decisions:
   - TSV format over JSON for append-friendly operations and easier
     manual inspection/editing in text editors
   - In-memory Map for fast lookups during batch processing
   - Supports comment lines starting with # for header row

4. Integration points:
   - ProcessedEntry and ProcessedEntrySchema from types.ts
   - ensureDir and fileExists utilities for filesystem operations

This enables idempotent reflect operations: the pipeline can be safely
re-run and will skip already-processed sessions, while allowing explicit
reprocessing via delete() when needed.
